who: Restaurant managers in multi-unit hospitality groups processing 5–15 employee schedules/month
offer: For restaurant managers in multi-unit hospitality groups processing 5–15 employee schedules/month, inefficient scheduling causes understaffing and overstaffing. We provide a streamlined scheduling app instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets or paper.
problem: Inefficient employee scheduling leading to understaffing and overstaffing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers posts on scheduling solutions
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
try_it: Let users try user-friendly scheduling interface and basic time tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual scheduling process
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing employee data
